📖

Welcome to The Library

😴

This website was built by a very idle student with little knowledge about coding. There might be bugs somewhere and occasional hiccups with web fluidity or book search — bear with it!

📚

This app is designed to help you keep track of your personal library — physical books or ebooks. Feel free to upload pictures of your own covers.

🤝

Share your colossal library with friends. Let's enjoy reading together and inspire each other with what's on our shelves.

🔍

The upper search bar finds Vietnamese book covers. The lower search bar finds English book covers. Use whichever matches the language of your book!

📂

You can categorize books however you like. Tap the ＋ button next to the category folder icon to create your own categories and organize your shelf.

💸

This website runs with zero budget. There may be occasional limitations on the database or book search — but as long as you don't search more than 10,000 books a day, not a penny is spent. 😊

🐍
"Knowledge is an Ouroboros."

The more you read, the more you realise how much there is left to read. The snake devours its own tail — and the cycle never ends.
